milestones.name: Data Pipeline v1
milestones.tester_condition: YouTube video IDs must be verified before DB seed

milestones.name: MVP Launch Ready
milestones.note: Deployed to https://seeneyu.vercel.app — DB seeded, all env vars set

milestones.name: Auth System
milestones.tester_condition: Learner can sign up, sign in, sign out. Admin routes return 401 for non-admins.

milestones.name: Marketing Materials
milestones.tester_condition: Pitch deck covers all 14 slides. One-pager fits one page. All P0 deliverables saved to .shared/outputs/marketer/.

milestones.name: Admin CMS
open_bugs: BUG-001 (medium): ClipForm score fields allow 1-10, model expects 1-3 — non-blocking
milestones.tester_condition: Admin can add/edit/delete clips from UI. Admin can view all learners and manage roles. Non-admin cannot access /admin.

milestones.name: Script-Aware Coaching Loop
milestones.tester_condition: Submit for AI Feedback works end-to-end. Record page shows character banner and script panel. Feedback page shows numbered action steps. AI prompt references character and script context.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — add script field to Clip
src/app/api/sessions/[id]/feedback/route.ts — enhanced prompt + steps + fix no-frames bug
prisma/seed.ts — script text added to all 15 clips

milestones.name: Observation Guide — Pre-Practice Clip Analysis
milestones.tester_condition: Before recording, learner sees a structured analysis of how the clip scene was conducted: techniques used, timestamps, why each works. Observation guide renders on the clip detail page before the learner clicks Record.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — add observationGuide JSON field to Clip

milestones.name: Micro-Practice Steps — Duolingo-Style Chunked Learning
milestones.tester_condition: Practice is split into 3-5 micro-steps. Each step shows what to focus on, has a max 30s recording, gets instant AI feedback on just that skill element. Completing all steps unlocks Full Performance challenge. Short recordings (≤30s) always produce at least 1 frame for AI analysis.
deliverables: src/components/MicroPracticeFlow.tsx — stepper UI with progress bar
src/components/MicroRecorder.tsx — 30s max recorder with instant feedback
src/app/library/[clipId]/record/RecordClient.tsx — enforce 30s max + Whisper audio for vocal clips

milestones.name: Onboarding Assessment & Personalized Learning Path
milestones.tester_condition: New user completes a 5-skill screening quiz on signup. AI scores their baseline. System generates a recommended learning path (ordered clip sequence per skill level). Learning path shown on dashboard. Progress tracked level by level.
deliverables: src/app/dashboard/page.tsx — personalized learning path + skill level progress
src/components/SkillProgressBar.tsx — level progression per skill category

milestones.name: Content Expansion — 100+ Lessons from Screenplay Films
milestones.tester_condition: Library has 100+ verified clips from films with public screenplays. Each clip has screenplay_source URL, script excerpt, observation_guide, and practice_steps. Library filter by film works. DB seed runs clean.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — add screenplaySource field to Clip
prisma/seed.ts — updated to seed all 100+ clips
src/app/library/page.tsx — expanded filters (by film, screenplay status)

milestones.name: Performing Foundation Section
milestones.tester_condition: Foundation section at /foundation. 3 courses (Voice, Verbal, Body Language), 10+ lessons each. Each lesson: theory text, 2+ YouTube examples, 3-5 question quiz. Progress persists per user. Separate from the practice/library section.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — FoundationCourse, FoundationLesson, LessonExample, QuizQuestion, FoundationProgress models

milestones.name: Library UX — Collapsible Filters, Search & Thumbnail Resize
milestones.note: BE code complete 2026-03-24. Awaiting Builder deploy + Tester sign-off.
milestones.tester_condition: Library page: (1) All filters collapsed into a toggleable panel by default. (2) Search bar visible above filters — queries clip title, film, skill, character. (3) Web thumbnails are visibly smaller in the grid (desktop: 4 columns vs current 3). (4) Filters panel expand/collapse is animated. (5) Search debounce works — no request on every keypress.
deliverables: src/app/library/page.tsx — search param + pass to filter component
src/app/library/LibraryFilters.tsx — wrap all filters in collapsible panel, add search input
src/app/api/clips/route.ts (or library data fetch) — support ?search= query param
src/components/ClipCard.tsx — smaller thumbnail variant for library grid

milestones.name: Brand Refresh — PeeTeeAI Identity, Homepage Redesign, Header & Footer
milestones.note: BE code complete 2026-03-24. Awaiting Builder deploy + Tester sign-off.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Header shows PeeTeeAI JSC branding + link to www.peetees.ai. (2) Footer is professional: company name, tagline 'Your AI, your PT', navigation links, copyright. (3) Homepage has: hero with abstract sporty/futuristic gradient background, Our Mission section, Our Team section (3+ members), Testimonials section (3+ quotes). (4) All sections render correctly on mobile. (5) No broken links.
deliverables: src/app/page.tsx — hero redesign + Mission + Team + Testimonials sections
public/ — team member photos (placeholder avatars if real photos not provided)
tailwind.config.ts — any new gradient/animation tokens needed

milestones.name: Micro Training Arcade Zone — <10s Challenge Activities
milestones.note: BE code complete 2026-03-24. 3 new Prisma models + GPT-4o scorer + full UI. Awaiting Builder deploy + Tester sign-off.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) /arcade page loads with list of challenge bundles. (2) Each challenge card shows: type (facial/gesture), description, difficulty, source context. (3) User can start a challenge — camera activates, 10s countdown. (4) On submit: GPT-4o Vision compares user video frame with challenge reference, returns score 0-100. (5) Score shown with breakdown. (6) Progress tracked per user. (7) Facial expression and body gesture challenge types both work.
deliverables: src/app/api/arcade/attempts/route.ts — submit attempt, trigger GPT-4o Vision comparison
src/services/arcade-scorer.ts — GPT-4o Vision frame extraction + similarity scoring

milestones.name: Learning Features — Screenplay Crawl-to-DB, Fix Crawl Jobs, ZIP Import
milestones.note: BE code complete 2026-03-24. Screenplay crawler, crawl-jobs fix, ZIP import. Awaiting Builder deploy + Tester sign-off.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Screenplay text is stored in DB (screenplayText field on Clip) — not just a link. (2) Admin can trigger 'Crawl Screenplay' on any clip with a screenplaySource URL — text saves to DB. (3) Crawl jobs execute successfully (YouTube API returns results, AI scores them). (4) Admin can upload a .zip file containing video + metadata.json + optional screenplay.txt + optional practice_steps.json — system imports it as a complete Clip with all relationships. (5) ZIP import validates structure before importing.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — add screenplayText String? to Clip model
src/app/api/admin/clips/[id]/crawl-screenplay/route.ts — POST: fetch screenplaySource URL, extract text, save to screenplayText
src/services/screenplay-crawler.ts — HTTP fetch + text extraction from known screenplay sites (IMSDB, scripts.com, etc.)
src/app/api/admin/crawl-jobs/[id]/run/route.ts — fix YOUTUBE_API_KEY env read, fix error handling
src/app/api/admin/import-zip/route.ts — POST multipart: accept .zip, unzip, validate structure, create Clip + related records
src/services/zip-importer.ts — unzip, parse metadata.json, upload video to Vercel Blob, validate screenplay, create DB records
src/app/admin/import/page.tsx — admin UI for ZIP upload with progress indicator
src/app/admin/clips/[id]/edit/page.tsx — 'Crawl Screenplay' button if screenplaySource set

milestones.name: Learning Materials Builder — Admin Clip Crawl & Curation System
milestones.tester_condition: Admin can create a crawl job with skill category + technique + keywords. Running the job returns YouTube video candidates scored by AI relevance. Admin can preview each video, approve (creates a Clip with auto-generated observation guide + practice steps) or reject. Approved clips appear in the Library. Special communication tactics (beyond the 5 standard categories) are supported as job criteria.
deliverables: src/app/admin/crawl-jobs/[id]/page.tsx — job detail + results browser + approve/reject
src/services/youtube-crawler.ts — YouTube Data API v3 search service

milestones.name: Arcade Content Management — Admin CRUD + Reference Images
milestones.note: BE code complete 2026-03-25 (commit 38d204a). Deployed. Awaiting DB seed + Tester sign-off.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Admin can create new ArcadeBundle + ArcadeChallenge from /admin/arcade. (2) Admin can edit existing bundles and challenges. (3) Admin can delete bundles/challenges. (4) Each challenge has a referenceImageUrl — auto-captured from YouTube or uploaded. (5) Reference images display on challenge cards. (6) Challenges can be reordered. (7) Image upload to Vercel Blob works.
deliverables: src/services/frame-capture.ts — YouTube frame capture / image upload

milestones.name: User Activity Analytics Dashboard — Admin
milestones.note: BE code complete 2026-03-25 (commit 38d204a). Deployed. Awaiting Tester sign-off.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) /admin/analytics shows DAU/WAU/MAU, signups chart. (2) Per-user activity view with login timestamps, usage stats. (3) Learning curves per user (line chart). (4) Aggregated usage: most practiced clips, popular skills. (5) Activity tracking captures page views, logins, practices, arcade attempts.

milestones.name: Feature Performance Dashboard — Crawling & MediaPipe Analytics
milestones.note: BE code complete 2026-03-25 (commit 38d204a). Deployed. Awaiting Tester sign-off.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) /admin/analytics/features shows crawl job stats. (2) MediaPipe performance: analysis time, detection rates, score distributions. (3) Content pipeline stats. (4) Data refreshes on page load.

milestones.name: Access Control — Auth Gating, Free Tier Limits
milestones.note: BE code complete 2026-03-25 (commit 38d204a). Deployed. Awaiting Tester sign-off.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Non-logged-in: first 3 arcade challenges per type free, rest locked. (2) Locked content shows blurred with lock icon + sign-in prompt. (3) Practice/record require auth. (4) Library browsing free for all. (5) Signed-in users can access all arcade + practice.

milestones.name: Subscription Plans & Payment — Basic/Standard/Advanced + PayPal + VNPay
milestones.note: BE code complete 2026-03-25 (commit 38d204a). Deployed. BUG-005: pricing page uses admin-only API. BUG-006: Plan records not seeded.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) 3 plans on /pricing page. (2) Admin-configurable pricing at /admin/plans. (3) Basic: free, 5s video, short feedback. (4) Standard: monthly+annual, 30s video, full feedback. (5) Advanced: monthly+annual, 3min video, VIP lessons, monthly coach summary. (6) PayPal sandbox checkout works. (7) VNPay sandbox checkout works. (8) Plan enforcement across all features.

milestones.name: Sign-Up with Registration Approval
milestones.description: Email/password signup with admin approval gate. User registers → status 'pending' → admin approves/rejects → user gains access. Schema adds status/statusNote/approvedAt/approvedBy to User. Modify auth to check approval. New /auth/pending page. Admin approval UI on /admin/users.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) New user signup sets status='pending'. (2) Pending user cannot access protected routes. (3) Admin can approve/reject from /admin/users with statusNote. (4) Approved user can sign in normally. (5) Rejected user sees rejection reason. (6) Existing users remain status='approved' after migration. (7) /auth/pending page shows 'account under review' message.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — add status, statusNote, approvedAt, approvedBy to User + @@index([status])
prisma/migrations/ — migration sets existing users to status='approved'
src/app/api/auth/signup/route.ts — return pending message, no auto-login
src/app/admin/users/page.tsx — status column, filter tabs, approve/reject buttons

milestones.name: Discussions (Comments & Replies)
milestones.description: Text comment/reply threads on lessons and arcade challenges. New Comment model with flat threading (1 level), polymorphic target (lessonId or challengeId), admin moderation (isHidden). CRUD API at /api/comments, admin moderation at /api/admin/comments. CommentThread/CommentCard/CommentForm components. Rate limiting 5/min, XSS sanitization.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Users can post comments on lessons and arcade challenges. (2) Users can reply to comments (1 level deep). (3) Users can edit own comments within 15min. (4) Users can delete own comments. (5) Admin can hide/unhide comments. (6) Rate limiting: max 5 comments/min. (7) XSS sanitization on all input. (8) CommentThread renders correctly with replies.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — Comment model (flat threading, polymorphic target)

milestones.name: Learning & Practicing AI Assistant (Coach Ney)
milestones.description: Voice-enabled AI coach 'Coach Ney' using OpenAI (Whisper STT + GPT-4o + TTS). New AssistantConversation + AssistantMessage models. assistant-service.ts builds dynamic system prompt with learner context + lesson script. API at /api/assistant/chat with streaming. Floating button bottom-right, slide-up chat panel, voice recorder. Idle nudge at 60s/120s. Plan limits: Basic=5msg/day text-only, Standard=50+voice, Advanced=unlimited.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Floating amber button visible bottom-right on lesson/arcade pages. (2) Click opens chat panel (slide-up mobile, side panel desktop). (3) Text chat works with streaming response. (4) Voice recording via microphone works (Whisper STT). (5) TTS playback of assistant responses. (6) Context-aware: assistant knows current lesson/arcade content. (7) Idle nudge appears at 60s and 120s of inactivity. (8) Plan limits enforced: Basic=5msg/day text-only, Standard=50+voice, Advanced=unlimited. (9) Quick-reply suggestion chips shown.
deliverables: src/services/assistant-service.ts — dynamic system prompt + context builder
src/hooks/useAssistant.ts — chat state + idle detection hook

milestones.name: Backend Toolkit — Data Crawler
milestones.description: Multi-source content crawler for enriching library. ContentSource + ExpressionAsset models. Crawls articles, research papers, expression databases, YouTube timestamps. Admin curation workflow at /admin/toolkit/crawler. Services under src/toolkit/data-crawler/.
milestones.tester_condition: Crawler pipeline works end-to-end: create job, run, curate results, publish to library. ContentSource and ExpressionAsset records persist. Admin UI at /admin/toolkit/crawler is functional.
deliverables: src/toolkit/data-crawler/ — article-crawler, research-crawler, expression-db-crawler, youtube-timestamp-parser, content-enricher services

milestones.name: Backend Toolkit — Mini-Games + Embeddable iframe
milestones.description: 3 mini-games for data collection: Guess Expression, Match Expression, Expression King Challenge. MiniGame/MiniGameRound/MiniGameSession/ExpressionSubmission models. Embeddable via iframe under src/app/(embed)/games/. Anonymous play, PostMessage bridge, certificate generator. Public API at /api/public/games/. Expression King reuses MediaPipe expression-scorer.
milestones.tester_condition: All 3 mini-games playable end-to-end. Iframe embedding works (CORS, PostMessage). Anonymous play supported with optional signup linking. Expression King uses MediaPipe scoring. Certificate generated on completion.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — MiniGame, MiniGameRound, MiniGameSession, ExpressionSubmission models
src/toolkit/mini-games/components/ — GuessExpressionGame, MatchExpressionGame, ExpressionKingGame, GameShell, LeaderboardPanel, CertificateCard

milestones.name: Core Gamification Engine
milestones.description: Duolingo-style gamification: XP system (25-100 XP per activity), streaks with flame icon, hearts/energy (5/day Basic, unlimited paid), daily quests (3/day + bonus), 30+ achievement badges, levels (1-50), celebration animations (confetti, star burst, badge reveal). UserGamification/XpTransaction/DailyQuest/Badge/UserBadge models. Services under src/services/gamification/. API at /api/gamification/.
milestones.tester_condition: XP awards correctly for all activity types (25-100 range). Streaks track daily login/practice. Hearts deduct on wrong answers and refill daily. Daily quests generate 3/day + bonus. Badges unlock on criteria met. Levels progress 1-50. Celebration animations trigger.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — UserGamification, XpTransaction, DailyQuest, Badge, UserBadge models
src/services/gamification/ — xp-engine, streak-tracker, hearts-manager, quest-generator, badge-evaluator
src/components/gamification/ — celebration components (confetti, star burst, badge reveal, level-up modal)

milestones.name: Social & Competitive Features
milestones.description: Leaderboards (weekly XP, per-skill, mini-game), 5-tier league system (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Platinum/Diamond with weekly promotion/demotion), follow/friends system, activity feed, combo multiplier (2x-5x XP), web push notifications for streaks/quests. Leaderboard/UserFollow/PushSubscription models.
milestones.tester_condition: Leaderboards rank users correctly (weekly XP, per-skill, mini-game). League promotion/demotion works weekly. Follow/unfollow works. Activity feed shows recent actions. Combo multiplier applies correctly. Push notifications fire for streaks/quests.
deliverables: src/components/gamification/ — LeaderboardTable, LeagueCard, FollowButton, ActivityFeed, ComboCounter

milestones.name: UI Micro-Interactions & Coach Ney Mascot
milestones.description: Coach Ney avatar component in 3 sizes throughout app (empty states, encouragements, errors, celebrations). CoachNeySays speech bubble component. CelebrationOverlay (confetti/particles), LevelUpModal, BadgeReveal, StreakToast, ComboCounter, XP float text. Micro-copy system in src/lib/micro-copy.ts with context-aware encouraging messages.
milestones.tester_condition: Coach Ney avatar renders in 3 sizes. Speech bubble shows context-aware messages. CelebrationOverlay triggers on achievements. LevelUpModal, BadgeReveal, StreakToast all animate correctly. Micro-copy varies by context.
deliverables: src/components/celebrations/ — CelebrationOverlay, LevelUpModal, BadgeReveal, StreakToast, ComboCounter, XpFloatText

milestones.name: Navigation & Layout Overhaul
milestones.description: Mobile bottom tab bar (5 tabs: Home/Learn/Practice/Arcade/Profile, amber active state). NavBar gamification widgets (streak flame, heart counter, XP mini-bar, level badge). Skill tree visualization (vertical node path like Duolingo). ProgressRing SVG component. Dashboard redesign with skill tree.
milestones.tester_condition: Bottom tab bar shows on mobile with 5 tabs and amber active state. NavBar widgets display streak/hearts/XP/level. Skill tree renders vertical node path. ProgressRing SVG animates. Dashboard redesigned with skill tree.
deliverables: src/components/navigation/ — BottomTabBar, NavBarWidgets (StreakFlame, HeartCounter, XpBar, LevelBadge)
src/components/skill-tree/ — SkillTree vertical node path, SkillNode

milestones.name: Accessibility & Polish
milestones.description: Reduced motion support (prefers-reduced-motion disables animations). ARIA live regions for XP gains, level ups, badge unlocks. Focus-visible amber ring outlines. Page transition animations. WCAG AA color contrast audit. Keyboard navigation for bottom tab + skill tree. Loading skeleton consistency.
milestones.tester_condition: prefers-reduced-motion disables all animations. ARIA live regions announce XP/level/badge changes. Focus-visible shows amber ring. Keyboard navigation works for bottom tab and skill tree. WCAG AA contrast passes audit. Loading skeletons consistent across pages.
deliverables: src/components/ — ARIA live regions on gamification components
tailwind.config.ts — focus-visible amber ring, page transition keyframes

milestones.name: Error Logging System
milestones.description: Centralized error logging infrastructure. ErrorLog Prisma model. Server-side src/lib/logger.ts utility. Public POST /api/logs (rate-limited, no auth) for client errors. Admin GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/admin/logs. Admin logs viewer page at /admin/logs with filtering by severity, source, date range. Client-side ErrorBoundary + client-logger.ts for automatic error capture.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Client errors captured by ErrorBoundary and sent to /api/logs. (2) Server errors logged via logger.ts utility. (3) Admin /admin/logs page shows all logs with severity/source/date filters. (4) Rate limiting prevents log spam. (5) Admin can mark logs as resolved or delete. (6) ErrorBoundary renders fallback UI on crash.
deliverables: src/components/ErrorBoundary.tsx — React error boundary with fallback UI
src/app/api/admin/logs/route.ts — GET admin endpoint with filters

milestones.name: CMS for Frontend Content
milestones.description: Full CMS system for managing frontend content. Models: CmsPage (slug, title, content JSON, published), BlogPost (title, slug, excerpt, content, coverImage, author, publishedAt), SiteSettings (singleton: siteName, tagline, logoUrl, socialLinks JSON, footerText), TeamMember (name, role, bio, photoUrl, order). Full CRUD API at /api/admin/cms/ for all models. Public read API at /api/cms/. Image upload to Vercel Blob. Admin pages: page editor, blog editor with TipTap rich text, team manager, site settings with logo upload.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Admin can create/edit/delete CMS pages with rich content. (2) Admin can manage blog posts with TipTap editor and cover images. (3) Admin can manage team members (name, role, bio, photo). (4) Admin can update site settings (name, tagline, logo, social links). (5) Public API serves published content. (6) Image uploads to Vercel Blob work. (7) Unpublished pages hidden from public API.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — CmsPage, BlogPost, SiteSettings, TeamMember models
src/app/admin/cms/ — admin CMS pages (page editor, blog editor, team manager, settings)

milestones.name: Light Mode UI Overhaul
milestones.description: Full light mode retheme replacing dark UI (gray-900/950) with warm light Duolingo-inspired palette. Update tailwind.config.ts color tokens. Retheme every page: homepage, library, foundation, arcade, practice, feedback, admin, auth. Maintain amber accent. Ensure WCAG AA contrast. Designer provides full color palette spec.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) All pages use light background instead of dark. (2) Amber accent preserved. (3) WCAG AA contrast passes on all text. (4) No dark mode remnants (no gray-900/950 backgrounds). (5) Cards, buttons, inputs all rethemed. (6) Admin pages also light. (7) Mobile responsive maintained.
deliverables: tailwind.config.ts — updated color tokens for light mode
All page and component files — rethemed to light palette

milestones.name: Homepage Media Content
milestones.description: Rich media sections on homepage sourced from CMS. Demo videos/photos showing platform in action. Testimonials carousel from CMS. Platform screenshots gallery. Before/after comparison section. All content editable via CMS admin.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Homepage shows demo videos/photos from CMS. (2) Testimonials carousel renders from CMS data. (3) Media content editable via admin CMS. (4) Responsive on mobile. (5) Images lazy-loaded. (6) No hardcoded content — all from CMS.
deliverables: src/app/page.tsx — media sections pulling from CMS API

milestones.name: App Download Section
milestones.description: App download section on homepage and dedicated /download page. Phone mockup image. App Store / Google Play badges (placeholder links). QR code for mobile download. Download copy from CMS. Responsive design with phone mockup positioning.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Download section visible on homepage. (2) /download page accessible. (3) Phone mockup image renders. (4) App store badges display. (5) QR code renders. (6) Copy editable via CMS. (7) Responsive on mobile.

milestones.name: Sticky Practice Content
milestones.description: Refactor practice page layout with sticky split-pane: video player sticky on left, practice steps scrollable on right. On mobile: video collapses to mini-player at top when scrolling down. Practice content stays visible while recording. StickyPracticeLayout component.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Desktop: video player sticky on left, steps scroll on right. (2) Mobile: video collapses to mini-player on scroll. (3) Practice instructions visible during recording. (4) Smooth transitions between sticky states. (5) Works on all practice pages (micro-practice, full performance).

milestones.name: Submission Review
milestones.description: User can review past practice submissions in a gallery view. Side-by-side comparison of original clip vs user recording. Filter by skill, date, score. Replay recordings from Vercel Blob. Admin can view all user submissions. SubmissionGallery + ComparisonView components.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) User can see gallery of past submissions. (2) Side-by-side comparison view works (original clip + user recording). (3) Filter by skill/date/score. (4) Recordings play from Vercel Blob. (5) Admin can view any user's submissions. (6) Empty state when no submissions.

milestones.name: Tiered Scoring Feedback
milestones.description: Feedback detail level gated by subscription tier. Basic: overall score + 1-line summary (rest blurred). Standard: full breakdown + action steps. Advanced: full + personalized coach notes + trend analysis. LockedFeedbackSection component with blur overlay and upgrade CTA. API filters feedback response based on user plan.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Basic users see score + summary, rest blurred with upgrade CTA. (2) Standard users see full feedback breakdown. (3) Advanced users see full + coach notes + trends. (4) Blur overlay renders correctly over locked sections. (5) Upgrade CTA links to /pricing. (6) Plan change immediately affects feedback visibility.
deliverables: src/components/LockedFeedbackSection.tsx — blur overlay with upgrade CTA

milestones.name: User Management v2
milestones.description: Enhanced admin user management. User model extensions: displayName, avatarUrl, bio, phone, lastActiveAt, loginCount. Admin user detail page with tabs: Profile, Activity, Submissions, Subscription, Logs. Bulk actions (approve, suspend, export). User search and advanced filters. User export to CSV.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) User detail page shows tabbed view (Profile/Activity/Submissions/Subscription/Logs). (2) Bulk approve/suspend works. (3) User search by name/email. (4) Advanced filters (status, plan, last active). (5) CSV export downloads. (6) New User fields (displayName, avatarUrl, bio, phone, lastActiveAt, loginCount) persist.

milestones.name: Game Data Collection Pipeline
milestones.description: Pipeline for exporting and standardizing expression data collected from mini-games and arcade. Training data export format (CSV/JSON). Expression label taxonomy definition. Data standardizer service that normalizes raw submissions into labeled training data. Export API at /api/admin/data-export/. Admin data export page with format selection and date range filtering.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Admin can export expression data as CSV or JSON. (2) Export filters by date range and expression type. (3) Data standardizer normalizes raw submissions. (4) Expression label taxonomy documented. (5) Export includes metadata (user anonymized, timestamp, game type, scores). (6) Large exports don't timeout.
deliverables: src/services/data-standardizer.ts — normalize raw submissions to labeled data

milestones.name: AI Content Generator
milestones.description: 3-step toolkit: (1) GPT-4o-mini generates scene descriptions + prompts, (2) Free AI models (Pollinations.ai primary, HF secondary, DALL-E fallback) generate images/videos, (3) Convert to Clip-compatible practice content. New models: AiContentRequest, AiGeneratedAsset. Clip model extended with mediaUrl/mediaType. Admin review before publishing.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Admin can create content requests with expression type + body language + scene context. (2) GPT-4o-mini generates scene descriptions and image prompts. (3) Pollinations.ai generates images without API key. (4) HF and DALL-E fallbacks work when configured. (5) Admin can review, select, and publish generated images as Clips. (6) Library displays AI-generated clips with mediaType=ai_image correctly. (7) Video generation is optional and gracefully skipped if unavailable.
deliverables: prisma/schema.prisma — AiContentRequest + AiGeneratedAsset models, Clip mediaUrl/mediaType fields
src/app/api/admin/toolkit/ai-generator/ — 9 API routes (CRUD, generate, publish, stats)
src/app/admin/toolkit/ai-generator/ — 3 admin pages (dashboard, new request, request detail)

milestones.name: Learning Assistant Engine Core + In-App Channel
milestones.description: Abstract, SaaS-ready Learning Assistant Engine. Core engine class with ILearner/IContentProvider/INotificationChannel interfaces. 3 analyzers (progress, engagement, skill-gap), 3 planners (activity, reminder, motivation), in-app channel, template system, scheduler, cron routes. 6 new DB models. Hook into processActivity(). Proactive suggestion banner on dashboard.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Engine core initializes with ILearner/IContentProvider/INotificationChannel interfaces. (2) 3 analyzers produce correct analysis (progress, engagement, skill-gap). (3) 3 planners generate appropriate plans (activity, reminder, motivation). (4) In-app notification channel delivers messages. (5) Template system renders dynamic content. (6) Scheduler triggers via cron routes. (7) 6 new DB models persist correctly. (8) processActivity() hook triggers engine. (9) Proactive suggestion banner visible on dashboard.
deliverables: src/engine/learning-assistant/ — core engine class, interfaces (ILearner, IContentProvider, INotificationChannel)
prisma/schema.prisma — 6 new models for learning assistant
src/components/SuggestionBanner.tsx — proactive suggestion banner on dashboard

milestones.name: Push Notifications Channel
milestones.description: Web Push via web-push npm. Service worker, PushPermissionPrompt component, push subscription API, notification click tracking, deep links. VAPID key setup.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) PushPermissionPrompt component requests browser permission. (2) Service worker registers and handles push events. (3) Push subscription saved via API. (4) Notifications delivered via web-push. (5) Click tracking records user interaction. (6) Deep links navigate to correct page on click. (7) VAPID keys configured correctly.
deliverables: public/sw.js — service worker for push notifications

milestones.name: Email Channel + Weekly Reports
milestones.description: Email via Resend (free tier 3000/month). React Email templates for weekly report, streak celebration, comeback, level-up. Weekly report cron job. User email preferences.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) Email channel sends via Resend API. (2) React Email templates render correctly (weekly report, streak celebration, comeback, level-up). (3) Weekly report cron job triggers and sends reports. (4) User can set email preferences (opt-in/out per type). (5) Free tier limit (3000/month) respected. (6) Unsubscribe link works.
deliverables: src/emails/ — React Email templates (weekly-report, streak-celebration, comeback, level-up)

milestones.name: WhatsApp Channel + Engagement Analytics
milestones.description: WhatsApp via Twilio. Opt-in flow, quick-reply buttons, webhook handler. Full engagement analytics admin dashboard with notification performance metrics.
milestones.tester_condition: (1) WhatsApp opt-in flow captures user phone number. (2) Messages sent via Twilio WhatsApp API. (3) Quick-reply buttons work in WhatsApp. (4) Webhook handler processes incoming replies. (5) Engagement analytics dashboard shows notification performance metrics. (6) Admin can view delivery rates, open rates, click-through by channel. (7) Opt-out flow works.
